_comment: Per-command cache lifecycle policy. unload[] items are cleared when the command completes. keep[] items survive unload. Persistent disk state (issues, project_summary.md, project_detail.md, config.yaml, .env) is never touched.

cache_keys.analysis_cache: repo file analysis used for smarter issue suggestions
cache_keys.project_docs_cache: your project summary and design notes
cache_keys.analyzer_snapshot: saved analysis snapshot — which files were scanned
cache_keys.file_hashes: file content hashes to skip re-reading unchanged files
cache_keys.file_tree: saved file tree from last analysis
cache_keys.github_local_config: cached GitHub API responses for this session
cache_keys.docs_strategy: how docs were generated last time
cache_keys.docs_config: connected primary and other reference docs
cache_keys.session_repo_confirmation: which repo was confirmed for this session
cache_keys.project_summary: project goals, tech stack, and milestones

gh-plan.description: Full integrated planning flow — heavy analysis + docs loaded

gh-plan-analyze.description: Repo analysis only — clears analysis artifacts, keeps docs

gh-plan-create.description: Single issue creation — lightweight, only clear session header

gh-plan-list.description: Issue listing — nothing to unload, stateless read

gh-plan-setup.description: Workspace setup — clears repo cache so new repo is picked up

gh-plan-auth.description: Auth recovery — no caches to clear

gh-plan-unload.description: Manual full unload — clears everything except persistent config

gh-plan-settings.description: View/change planning preferences — keep all caches intact

create-github-repo.description: GitHub repo creation — keep repo_cache warm after linking

current-stat.description: Status snapshot — read-only, nothing to unload

gh-implementation.description: Switch to implementation — clear analysis/file-scan caches; keep project docs, labels, milestones (implementation needs them)

gh-implementation/implement.description: Implement a single issue — no additional unloads

init.description: Project bootstrap — stateless operation, nothing to unload
